original_prompt: 给这个朱砂手串做一张淘宝主图，要求红色背景
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Modern Chinese E-commerce Jewelry Photography. A close-up, high-angle shot of [Subject Lock: A beaded bracelet featuring a primary sequence of deep red, spherical beads with a distinct 'goldstone' glitter effect. The beads exhibit a high-gloss finish... paired with a singular peach accent stone and a blue cloisonné-style floral metal charm]. The product is displayed on a textured, deep crimson velvet surface or a smooth red matte pedestal, creating a sophisticated 'Red on Red' aesthetic. 
[Props]: Minimalist geometric red blocks or a subtle traditional Chinese knot in the blurred background.
[Background]: Rich, monochromatic red studio background with a slight radial gradient to add depth.
Lighting is High-Key Commercial Studio Lighting with strong rim lights (backlighting) to separate the red beads from the red background. Sharp specular highlights on the beads emphasize the glossy texture.

[Text & UI Layout]
***Layout Style**: Center-Focused or Right-Aligned Negative Space.
Text Rendering Instructions (White and Gold scheme for maximum contrast against red):
1. **Main Title**: Content: “帝王紫金砂”. Position: [Top Right or Top Center]. Style: [3D Bold Serif in Brushed Gold texture].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: “本命年招财纳福”. Style: [Clean White Sans-serif, smaller size].
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: “开光祈福”. Style: [Vertical tag on the left, Translucent White Glass effect].
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: “假一赔三”. Style: [Small Gold Seal icon].
layout_logic: Due to the Red-on-Red requirement, lighting separation is critical. The text must use White (#FFFFFF) or Luxury Gold (#D4AF37) to ensure readability. Avoid red text. Place the product centrally with strong rim lighting to create a 'halo' effect, separating it from the background.
